text:
1. Headache  – Paracetamol, Ibuprofen  
2. Fever  – Paracetamol, Ibuprofen  
3. Common Cold  – Cetirizine, Pseudoephedrine, Paracetamol  
4. Cough  – Dextromethorphan, Ambroxol  
5. Sore Throat  – Lozenges (Amylmetacresol), Paracetamol  
6. Indigestion  – Antacids (Omeprazole, Ranitidine)  
7. Acidity / Heartburn  – Pantoprazole, Famotidine  
8. Diarrhea  – ORS (Oral Rehydration Solution), Loperamide  
9. Constipation  – Lactulose, Isabgol (Psyllium husk)

10. Nausea / Vomiting  – Domperidone, Ondansetron  
11. Allergies  – Cetirizine, Loratadine  
12. Skin Rash  – Calamine lotion, Hydrocortisone cream  
13. Muscle Pain  – Diclofenac gel, Ibuprofen  
14. Joint Pain  – Naproxen, Aceclofenac  
15. Toothache  – Paracetamol, Ibuprofen  
16. Eye Irritation  – Artificial tears, Antihistamine eye drops  
17. Ear Pain  – Paracetamol, Antibiotic drops (if prescribed)  
18. Minor Burns  – Silver sulfadiazine cream, Aloe vera gel

19. Minor Cuts / Wounds  – Antiseptic solution (Dettol, Savlon), Antibiotic 
ointment  
20. Dizziness  – Meclizine, Dimenhydrinate  
21. Insomnia (Mild)  – Melatonin supplements, Chamomile tea  
22. Anxiety (Mild)  – Herbal remedies (Ashwagandha, Valerian root)  
23. Seasonal Flu  – Paracetamol, Antihistamines  
24. Gastric Ulcer (Mild)  – Omeprazole, Pantoprazole  
25. Migraine  – Sumatriptan, Paracetamol, Ibuprofen
